seoTitle: Best AI Wedding Planner Apps in 2026
metaDescription: Compare the best AI wedding planner apps and learn what couples need for checklists, budgets, guests, RSVPs, vendors, decor, and planning decisions.
h1: Best AI Wedding Planner Apps in 2026: What Couples Actually Need

faqs.q: What is the best AI wedding planner app?
faqs.a: The best AI wedding planner app connects chat with real planning tools—checklist, budget, guest list, RSVP links, vendors, decor, and notes—not just generic advice. WedCheese is built for this connected workflow.

faqs.q: Can AI replace a human wedding planner?
faqs.a: No. AI is best for admin-heavy work—timelines, budget tracking, RSVP follow-ups, and vendor emails. Emotional decisions and on-the-day coordination still need you (and optionally a human planner).

faqs.q: Is ChatGPT enough for wedding planning?
faqs.a: ChatGPT helps with writing and brainstorming, but it does not know your wedding date, budget, or RSVP count. A dedicated AI wedding planner app keeps that context in one place.

faqs.q: Are AI wedding planner apps free?
faqs.a: Many apps offer free tiers. WedCheese is free to start with optional Premium for more daily AI planning capacity during busy weeks.

seoTitle: AI Wedding Planner vs ChatGPT: Which Should Couples Use?
metaDescription: AI wedding planner vs ChatGPT—compare dedicated planning apps with generic AI for checklists, budgets, guests, RSVPs, and vendor admin.
h1: AI Wedding Planner vs ChatGPT: Which Should Couples Use?

faqs.q: Should I use ChatGPT or a wedding planning app?
faqs.a: Use ChatGPT for one-off writing tasks. Use a dedicated AI wedding planner like WedCheese for ongoing admin—checklists, budget, guests, RSVPs, and vendor search tied to your real wedding profile.

faqs.q: Can ChatGPT track my wedding budget?
faqs.a: Not reliably. You would need to paste numbers into every chat. A wedding budget tracker in an app updates automatically when you log deposits or RSVPs change.

faqs.q: Does WedCheese use AI like ChatGPT?
faqs.a: WedCheese uses AI with live context of your wedding—date, budget, guest count, vendors, and decor—plus tool actions like vendor search and checklist updates you approve first.

seoTitle: The Ultimate 12-Month Wedding Planning Checklist
metaDescription: Free 12 month wedding checklist for UK couples—month-by-month tasks plus how WedCheese builds a wedding timeline from your date.
h1: The Ultimate 12-Month Wedding Planning Checklist

faqs.q: When should I start my 12 month wedding checklist?
faqs.a: Ideally at engagement or as soon as you pick a date 12–18 months out. If you have less time, use a 6 month wedding checklist with accelerated phases instead.

faqs.q: What should I book first on a wedding checklist?
faqs.a: Venue and catering usually come first—they lock your date and guest capacity. Budget and guest list draft should happen in parallel.

faqs.q: Can an app replace my wedding planning spreadsheet?
faqs.a: Yes, if it generates tasks from your wedding date and tracks progress. WedCheese auto-builds timeline sections so you are not maintaining rows manually.

seoTitle: Planning a Wedding in 6 Months: Accelerated Checklist
metaDescription: 6 month wedding checklist for short engagements—compressed timeline, what to book first, and how WedCheese accelerates planning phases.
h1: Planning a Wedding in 6 Months: The Accelerated Checklist

faqs.q: Can you plan a wedding in 6 months?
faqs.a: Yes, with a compressed checklist that prioritises venue, catering, and photography first. WedCheese switches to accelerated timeline mode when your engagement is under nine months.

faqs.q: What do you skip with a 6 month engagement?
faqs.a: You may simplify decor, reduce custom stationery lead times, and book vendors in parallel rather than sequentially—but you should not skip budget planning or RSVPs.

seoTitle: Average UK Wedding Cost in 2026: Budget Guide
metaDescription: What couples should budget for an average UK wedding cost in 2026—category splits, regional factors, and how to track spend in a wedding budget app.
h1: Average UK Wedding Cost in 2026: What Couples Should Budget For

faqs.q: How much does a wedding cost in the UK in 2026?
faqs.a: Costs vary widely by region, guest count, and day of week. Many couples spend between roughly £15,000 and £30,000 for a mid-size celebration, but your number depends on venue and catering choices.

faqs.q: What takes the biggest share of a UK wedding budget?
faqs.a: Venue hire and catering typically account for 40–50% of total spend, followed by photography, attire, and florals.

seoTitle: Wedding Budget Calculator: Split Money by Category
metaDescription: Use this wedding budget calculator guide to split money by category—percentages, examples, and WedCheese AI budget tracking for your guest count.
h1: Wedding Budget Calculator: How to Split Your Money by Category

faqs.q: How do I calculate my wedding budget by category?
faqs.a: Start with your total, assign percentages (venue ~45%, photo ~12%, etc.), then adjust for your priorities. A wedding budget app recalculates when guest count or quotes change.

seoTitle: How to Plan a £15,000 Wedding in the UK
metaDescription: Sample £15,000 wedding budget UK breakdown by category—venue, catering, photo, and how WedCheese calculates yours for your guest count.
h1: How to Plan a £15,000 Wedding in the UK

faqs.q: Is £15,000 enough for a UK wedding?
faqs.a: Yes for many couples planning 60–80 guests with careful category trade-offs. Location, day of week, and catering style move the number significantly.
